calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Continued To Aug-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff Hitachi Capital America Corp.
Order waiving live testimony of witness is in the court's file.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the filed declaration and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Anatoliy Kulya as follows:
Damages (contract balance) $12,066.13
Prejudgment Interest $5,051.25
Attorney's Fees $1,550.00
Costs $503.50, for a total of $19,170.88
No later than 05-18-10 Counsel to prepare the Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Continued To Jun-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Continued To Apr-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
